calendar.matters:
PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-06-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Claude Wyle, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. There is not an objection by appearing party. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by defendant nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)
